# Routing Table

Use this table to select the minimum workflow modules required for a request. Always load `core.md`, then load only the modules needed for the matched task type(s).

| Task Type | Trigger Keywords (Examples) | Required Workflows |
|---|---|---|
| `<task type>` | `<keyword 1>, <keyword 2>, <keyword 3>` | `core.md`, `<workflow>.md` |
